summary: Iteration 45: Full UI/UX Architecture Testing - All 15 feature areas verified. Testing focused on: Payments UI redesign (compact cards with pencil edit, pill toggle), Customer payment filter auto-refresh, new Checkout section in Website admin, References section Zoho amber panel, System Config without Zoho, Cart dynamic content from website settings.
critical_code_review_comments: CartContext.tsx: Pre-existing bug - The save useEffect (deps=[items]) runs after first render with items=[] before the load useEffect can set items from localStorage. This means a fresh full-page navigation to /cart always shows empty cart temporarily. Fix: initialize items from localStorage using useState lazy initializer: `useState(() => { const s = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY); return s ? JSON.parse(s) : []; })`. This doesn't break any current iteration features but is a UX issue for direct cart URL navigation.

Cart.tsx line 700: Checkout button disabled condition requires BOTH currentZohoProduct AND zohoSubscriptionType. But if checkout_zoho_product_options is empty (no product options configured), the currentZohoProduct dropdown is not shown, yet the checkout button still requires it. This could permanently block checkout if admin leaves product_options empty. Consider only requiring currentZohoProduct if the dropdown is shown (prodOpts.length > 0).

customer_filter.filter_auto_refresh: PASS - Shows GoCardless, Stripe, Both, None when providers enabled
customer_filter.filter_empty_when_disabled: PASS - Only shows All Payment Modes + None when disabled

system_config.zoho_category_absent: PASS - Zoho category NOT in System Config
system_config.zoho_reference_note: PASS - Note about References section shown

cart_dynamic_content.zoho_section_from_settings: PASS - title='Zoho Account Details' from ws.checkout_zoho_title
cart_dynamic_content.zoho_subscription_options_dynamic: PASS - Paid-Annual, Paid-Monthly, Free/Not on Zoho from ws settings
cart_dynamic_content.zoho_product_options_dynamic: PASS - Zoho One (Free), etc. from ws settings
cart_dynamic_content.partner_title_dynamic: PASS - 'Have you tagged us as your Zoho Partner?' from ws settings
cart_dynamic_content.partner_options_dynamic: PASS - Yes, Pre-existing Customer, Not yet from ws settings
cart_dynamic_content.partner_description_dynamic: PASS - description and partner tag links shown

seed_data_creation: GoCardless and Stripe were temporarily enabled during customer filter test, then restored to disabled state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45: All new UI/UX features verified. Payments section (Admin > Website > Payments): compact cards with colored dot status indicator, Enabled/Disabled pill toggle (API call works), pencil edit icon expands inline form with Label/Description/Credentials/FeeRate. Customer filter: paymentFilterOptions useMemo in CustomersTab.tsx correctly reflects ws.gocardless_enabled and ws.stripe_enabled from WebsiteContext. Checkout section (Admin > Website > Checkout, NEW): Zoho Account Details card with Visible/Hidden toggle + editable title/sub-options/product-options. Partner Tagging card with Visible/Hidden toggle + title/desc/options. Custom Extra Questions FormSchemaBuilder. References section: amber 'System Links (Zoho)' panel with 5 Zoho URL settings. System Config: only Operations + Feature Flags (no Zoho). Cart page: ALL checkout content dynamic from ws settings (zoho title, sub options, product options, partner title/desc/options, payment labels). Test customer: test-phase3-payment@example.com / TestPass123!. Admin: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!. Pre-existing CartContext bug noted (full-page navigation clears cart temporarily) - not introduced in this iteration.

rca_of_issues.cart_localStorage_timing: Pre-existing: CartContext.tsx save effect (deps=[items]) runs after first render with items=[] before load effect sets stored items. This briefly overwrites localStorage on full page reload. Not blocking but worth fixing with lazy useState initializer.
rca_of_issues.cart_checkout_button_blocked: Cart.tsx line 700: checkout button requires !currentZohoProduct even when product dropdown is not shown (when checkout_zoho_product_options is empty). If admin leaves product options empty, checkout is permanently blocked. Fix: only check currentZohoProduct when prodOpts.length > 0.
